ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the question */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the question */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the question */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the question was posted */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the question has received */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the question based on user votes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the question */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity on the question */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Whether the question is closed */,
  "closed_reason" TEXT /* Reason for closing the question */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Whether the question is locked */,
  "locked_reason" TEXT /* Reason for locking the question */,
  "viewed_by" TEXT /* List of user IDs who have viewed the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the answer belongs to */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the answer */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was posted */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the answer based on user votes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the answer */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Whether the answer is accepted by the question poster */,
  "accepted_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was accepted */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity on the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the comment belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer the comment belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user based on activity */,
  "badges" TEXT /* Badges earned by the user for achieving certain milestones */,
  "privileges" TEXT /* Privileges granted to the user based on reputation score */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* User's website URL */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "suspended" INTEGER /* Whether the user is suspended */,
  "suspended_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension */,
  "suspended_until" TEXT /* Date until the suspension lasts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the vote was cast on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who cast the vote */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to cast the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_votes_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answer_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer the vote was cast on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who cast the vote */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to cast the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answer_votes_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the action was taken on (if applicable) */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer the action was taken on (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., close question, delete answer) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., post question, post answer, comment) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the activity (if applicable) */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer related to the activity (if applicable) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment related to the activity (if applicable) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)
